scenes.label: Cold Open 1
scenes.narration_excerpt: Most founders bet everything on a single product. Dan is wagering on six at once. The mathematics of this approach will surprise you.
scenes.image_prompt: Vivid cinematic editorial scene: a bright golden coin in mid-air over a strategic chess board with six pieces moving in unison, dramatic warm key light, shallow depth of field, sense of calculated risk and quiet confidence, friendly approachable mood, 1920x1080 16:9, no text overlays, no AI-stock cliches
scenes.motion_prompt: slow cinematic dolly-in toward the coin, faint dust particles drifting up, sense of suspended decision

scenes.label: Context 2
scenes.narration_excerpt: by the end you will understand exactly why this calculated risk might be the smartest move in the room. He is a solo founder based in Cluj, Romania.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm cinematic establishing shot of Cluj-Napoca Romania at golden hour: red-tile roofs, Saint Michael church spire, modern tech building windows glowing, single founder silhouette at a cafe window with laptop, hopeful tone, vivid sunset colors gold orange soft red, 1920x1080, magazine editorial photography style
scenes.motion_prompt: gentle slow camera pan from cityscape rooftops toward the founder silhouette, golden light shifts subtly

scenes.label: DansLab founder
scenes.narration_excerpt: twenty twenty-seven. This is not a garage startup cobbled together on weekends. It is DansLab, a calculated portfolio play.
scenes.image_prompt: Editorial portrait of a Romanian solo founder in his early 30s at a modern minimalist desk, surrounded by 6 floating product UI mockups arranged in a hexagonal constellation, calm focused expression, vivid warm cinematic lighting gold cream sky-blue accent, DansLab subtly in background, friendly approachable mood, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: subtle parallax on the floating UIs, gentle camera push-in toward the founder
scenes.visual_focus: Dan portrait with 6 floating product UIs in hex constellation

scenes.label: Nervix orchestration
scenes.narration_excerpt: operation rests on Nervix, an orchestration engine that coordinates forty droplets across the infrastructure.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic 3D visualization of an orchestration backbone: a glowing central hub connected to 40 small server droplet nodes arranged in a sphere around it, the Nervix icon prominent at center, fiber-optic light trails between nodes, deep blue cyan warm orange accent, sense of calm coordination, modern data-center but warm not cold, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: slow rotation of the sphere, light pulses flowing along the fiber-optic trails between nodes

scenes.label: Pricing tiers
scenes.narration_excerpt: Platform customers pay between ninety-nine and four hundred ninety-nine dollars monthly for access to the system that makes the whole portfolio possible.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic data visualization: a vivid pricing tier chart floating in 3D space with two pricing tiers entry tier $19-$79/month and platform tier $99-$499/month rendered as glowing translucent prism cards, soft volumetric light, friendly tech magazine aesthetic, vivid colors sky blue warm gold soft mint, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: prism cards rotate slowly, light refracts through them as numbers gently animate

scenes.label: ZmartyChat
scenes.narration_excerpt: ZmartyChat proves this is real and not vaporware. The chatbot platform already serves active users generating genuine revenue today.
scenes.image_prompt: Polished product hero shot: ZmartyChat chatbot interface displayed on a floating glass mobile device, real chat conversation visible (friendly chatbot replies), the ZmartyChat logo prominently featured at top, surrounded by happy active-user portraits arranged in a soft hex grid, vivid tech-accessible palette, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: phone tilts subtly toward camera as chat messages slide in one by one, soft glow

scenes.label: Crawdbot + MyWork + SportsAI
scenes.narration_excerpt: Crawdbot handles web crawling while MyWork provides the agent framework. SportsAI represents the first live product running on this full stack.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic showcase of a sports analytics dashboard floating mid-air: real SportsAI live opportunities overview with green BUY signals, real-time odds, sports event cards, MyWork agent framework architecture diagram in soft background, Crawdbot crawler nodes feeding data in, vivid sports broadcast aesthetic but editorial, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: dashboard rotates slightly to reveal architecture in background, opportunity cards refresh subtly

scenes.label: SemeClaw + Ad-claw flagship
scenes.narration_excerpt: SemeClaw serves as the flagship product, complemented by Ad-claw for monetization across the suite.
scenes.image_prompt: Editorial flagship product showcase: SemeClaw dashboard rendered as the centerpiece on a marble-topped studio table, with the Ad-claw advertising platform UI floating beside it as a complementary panel, both lit by warm rim light, founder hands gesturing toward them, sense of premium tooling, vivid friendly aesthetic, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: founder hand subtly indicates the centerpiece, light shifts warmly across the marble surface

scenes.label: Portfolio math 2.3x
scenes.narration_excerpt: concentrated diversification where fixed infrastructure costs distribute across six revenue streams instead of only one.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic visualization of portfolio scaling math: six glowing product hexagons connected by light-trail bridges to a central hub, each hexagon emanating a different revenue stream as colored particle trails (gold, mint, sky, coral, lavender, cream), the trails merge into a single rising arc, warm vivid editorial palette, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: particle trails flow from each hexagon merging into one rising arc, gentle pulsing energy

scenes.label: 3 advices triptych
scenes.narration_excerpt: First, build infrastructure that scales across multiple products. Second, let early revenue validate direction. Third, maintain parallel development streams.
scenes.image_prompt: Three glowing wisdom cards arranged as a triptych on a wooden studio surface, each card labeled in warm gold lettering TOOLS MINDSET MONEY. Soft warm key light, founder hand reaching toward the center card, sense of distilled hard-won lessons, friendly editorial photography, vivid warm palette, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: cards lift gently, soft light shifts across the wood, hand subtly hovers

scenes.label: 3 advices content
scenes.narration_excerpt: revenue validate direction before committing significant resources to any one bet. Third, maintain parallel development.
scenes.image_prompt: Three open notebooks side by side on a clean studio desk, each with a different handwritten advice clearly readable in elegant script: notebook 1 says Build infrastructure first (Tools), notebook 2 says Patience over hustle (Mindset), notebook 3 says Validate revenue early (Money). Warm overhead light, vivid friendly aesthetic, magazine editorial photography, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: subtle page flutter, light shifts warmly, gentle parallax

scenes.label: Tomorrow hook + 3 options
scenes.narration_excerpt: What comes next: distribution channels for Nervix enterprise, mobile strategy for ZmartyChat, and the Ad-claw monetization platform launch timeline. Follow along.
scenes.image_prompt: Final hero CTA frame: three glowing option cards arranged horizontally, each with a clear number and label - Card 1 NERVIX deep dive, Card 2 ZMARTYCHAT launch story, Card 3 the math behind 6 bets. A warm subscribe button glows below them. Bright friendly cinematic lighting, vivid mint gold sky palette, optimistic tone, 1920x1080
scenes.motion_prompt: cards subtly pulse one by one as if highlighting, subscribe button glows warm
